'''DV-523''' was a [[clone stormtrooper]] who served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], DV-523 served aboard the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']], and took part in the ''Devastator''{{'s}} [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|attack]] on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']].

==Biography==
DV-523,<ref name="TCG" /> a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="Complete Visual Dictionary" /> [[Gender/Legends|male]],<ref name="SE" /> was a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]]<ref name="TCG" /> who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]<ref name="ANH" /> of the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]],<ref name="CSWE" /> an elite [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] [[Legion/Legends|unit]] under the direct command of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="BF2">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref> DV-523 had been stationed aboard<ref name="ANH" /> the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]],<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=''Devastator''}}</ref> the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']],<ref name="ANH" /> by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref>

In 0 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> after [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents transmitted the [[Battle of Toprawa|stolen]] [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]] for the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] to the Rebel [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]—the [[Consular ship/Legends|consular ship]] of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]—the ''Devastator'' pursued and [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|overtook]] the Rebel [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] runner, as the 501st boarded the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]]<ref name="ANH" /> from a [[TIE/br boarding shuttle]].<ref name="Cross Sections">''[[Star Wars: Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref> DV-523 was among the first wave of [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] who entered the corridors of the ''Tantive IV'' and [[Lightfight|engaged]] the [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] in battle. The battle ended as a victory for the 501st Legion, with the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the ''Tantive IV''{{'s}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]],<ref name="ANH" /> [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]],<ref name="DB2">{{DB|character|captainantilles|Antilles, Raymus}}</ref> and the capture of Organa. However, the Rebel [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] managed to make it off of the ''Devastator'' with the stolen [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] plans aboard an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].<ref name="ANH" />

==Equipment==
DV-523 wore the standard suit of [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]].<ref name="ANH" /> He<ref name="SE" /> wielded an [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]].<ref name="ANH" />

==Behind the scenes==
DV-523 first appeared in the opening scene of [[1977]]'s [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] as one of the stormtroopers taking part in the hijacking of the Rebel blockade runner ''Tantive IV''. He was played by an uncredited extra,<ref name="ANH" /> whose scenes were filmed in mid [[1976]] in the [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|United Kingdom]].<ref name="TMOSW">''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]''</ref> DV-523 was given a name on a [[2002]] card for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="TCG" />
